contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: DApp bell: wire Partner Stock attention (v1.1) + agentic_ai_context update
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/236
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/124
  
  Details:
  Wired a third notification source into the DApp bell after spotting that a parallel Claude session had shipped the Needs Attention scoring on partner_check_in.html itself. The bell now surfaces the same business signals the page renders inline.
  
  ## What shipped
  - dapp PR #236: New partner_stock source in js/notifications.js mirrors computeAttentionList() from partner_check_in.html. Reads partners-velocity.json + partners-inventory.json (both static GitHub-hosted), applies the same severity rules (critical: totalInv==0, warning: totalInv<=3, info: last_sale > 45d). Retail-only filter (Consignment | Wholesale). Top 4 partners in popup, sorted critical -> warning -> info -> alphabetical. Refactored the velocity cache from name-only map to full JSON since both partner sources consume it.
  - agentic_ai_context PR #124: Updates DAPP_NOTIFICATION_BADGE.md with the new module + a side-by-side comparison of the two Partner-related sources so future LLMs understand why they're kept separate.
  
  ## Why two Partner sources, not one
  - partner_followups: operator-driven cadence ('I scheduled a check-in for date X'). Source: GAS list_partners_needing_attention. Returns null until check-ins mature a Next-Check-in Date.
  - partner_stock: business-driven urgency ('stock or velocity says ACT'). Source: velocity + inventory static JSONs. Returns null when all retail partners have stock + recent sales.
  Both can fire on the same partner; that's by design — independent reasons to act.
  
  ## Anti-pattern still respected
  Per feedback_check_tracking_before_recommending_action.md, the badge does not invent activity. Both sources echo back signals the operator or the business already produced. The stock rules came from the existing partner_check_in.html scoring; the cadence comes from the operator's own check-in entries.
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/236 (Partner Stock source)
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/124 (doc update)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
